purpose: Day-7 SECOND independent external axis: MOUSE-KNOCKOUT / MODEL-ORGANISM phenotype evidence (IMPC/MGI via Open Targets mousePhenotypes, + NOD-mouse literature via PubMed). Pre-registered BEFORE any phenotype fetch or scoring.
claim_under_test: The calibrated gate's binary GO/WITHHOLD call predicts which gate-scored genes produce an IMMUNE-DYSREGULATION / AUTOIMMUNE phenotype on knockout/perturbation in mouse (orthogonal to human GWAS/eQTL) BETTER than function-blind baselines (OT T1D association score alone, eQTL-count alone, random).
why_independent: The gate/adjudication rule was constructed from {curated immune-GO, OT_T1D>T2D human association, GWAS T2D-tag, measured Treg direction, human cis-eQTL}. It NEVER used mouse-knockout phenotype data. IMPC/MGI mouse-KO phenotypes are generated in an orthogonal model system (mouse germline/conditional KO), so a validation against them CAN fail.
axis_source_primary: Open Targets target.mousePhenotypes (aggregates IMPC + MGI). Each row carries modelPhenotypeLabel + modelPhenotypeClasses (Mammalian Phenotype ontology top-level classes).
axis_source_secondary: PubMed NOD-mouse / model-organism T1D literature (independent of IMPC/MGI curation).
disclosure: During a connectivity probe BEFORE writing this prereg, the top-level MP CLASS LABELS (not scores) of 5 genes (IL2,PTPN2,CTLA4,PRKCQ,INSR) were observed. The MP top-level class vocabulary is a FIXED public ontology; the rule below is defined over that fixed vocabulary, not tuned to any gene's data. CD226 was observed to have 0 OT mousePhenotype rows (covered by NOD literature axis).

mouse_support_rule_FROZEN.MOUSE_IMMUNE_SUPPORT (primary binary lab: 1 iff the gene has >=1 OT mousePhenotype row whose modelPhenotypeClasses include ANY of: 'immune system phenotype' OR 'hematopoietic system phenotype'; else 0.
mouse_support_rule_FROZEN.MOUSE_DIABETES_SUPPORT (secondary binary: 1 iff the gene has >=1 mousePhenotype row whose modelPhenotypeLabel (case-insensitive) matches ANY of the frozen term list below, else 0.
mouse_support_rule_FROZEN.no_data_handling: Genes with 0 mousePhenotype rows from OT get y_mouse_immune=0,y_mouse_dm=0 from the IMPC/MGI axis; they are separately checked against the NOD-literature axis and flagged has_mouse_record=0 so the underpowered/no-data fraction is reported honestly (NOT silently counted as negatives in the headline).

nod_literature_protocol_FROZEN.genes_queried: trio CD226/RASGRP1/PRKCQ + all GO_arm genes + a frozen sample of the 98-gene eligible universe (every gene that ALSO received a gate call). Query = PubMed '<SYMBOL> AND (NOD mouse OR nonobese diabetic OR autoimmune diabetes OR insulitis)'.
nod_literature_protocol_FROZEN.support_call: lit_nod_support=1 iff PubMed total_count>=1 for the frozen query AND >=1 of the top-5 returned titles/abstracts is judged (by fixed adjudication prompt) to describe a mouse/NOD phenotype of the gene relevant to autoimmune diabetes / immune dysregulation; else 0. Counts + PMIDs recorded as receipts.
nod_literature_protocol_FROZEN.note: Literature axis is confirmatory/illustrative for key genes; the POWERED headline metric uses the IMPC/MGI axis over all 44 gate genes.

scoring_FROZEN.scoring_set: All 44 genes with a gate GO/WITHHOLD call in day6_external_frozen_scoring_table.json (labels_sha256 fcddae61...).

predictors_compared.ot_alone: OT T1D association score (continuous, function-blind baseline)

scoring_FROZEN.primary_metric: AUROC of each predictor against y_mouse_immune over the scoring set; also balanced accuracy / MCC for the binary gate vs y_mouse_immune. Bootstrap 95% CI (2000 resamples).
scoring_FROZEN.sensitivity_metric: repeat against y_mouse_any and on the 35-gene sensitivity subset (excl. 9 pure-metabolic NOGO distractors).

decision_rule.concordant: gate AUROC point estimate > best function-blind baseline AND gate-vs-best advantage bootstrap CI excludes 0
decision_rule.partial: gate AUROC > best baseline but CI includes 0 (advantage present, not powered)
decision_rule.discordant: gate AUROC <= best baseline (gate no better / worse than function-blind baseline)
decision_rule.underpowered: n genes with a mouse record < 8 OR n positives(y_mouse_immune) < 4 OR bootstrap CI so wide no ranking is distinguishable

honesty_note: Labels frozen by hash BEFORE any AUROC computed. A NEGATIVE / NULL / UNDERPOWERED result WILL be reported plainly. No gene hand-picking; rule applied deterministically to all 44.
